ItacPersonItem.Notes: Renzuoli was a jurist, received his degree in Pisa and moved to Venice where he worke as `revisore dei libri` between 1631 and 1661. He was the teacher of Battista Felice Gaspare Nani.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
